title: Rename device - Rename, emojis not allowed
scenario: Device name field in Device Settings > General allows emojis; Done button should be disabled and name should not update on Home screen
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Tap on the device name or go to Device Settings > General
Tap on the device name field to edit it
Enter emojis (e.g., 😀, 🎧, ✅) into the device name field
Observe the state of the "Done" button
Attempt to save by tapping "Done" (if enabled)
Return to Home screen and observe the displayed device name
expected: The "Done" button should be disabled when emojis are entered in the device name field. The device name should not be changed. On the Home screen, the device name should remain unchanged (original name without emojis).
